---
name: madp-participant
description: Participate in MADP v0.3.0-alpha.3 as a bounded AI or human reviewer without acquiring undeclared authority.
---
Use `MADP-v0.3.0-alpha.3`.
Identify participant ID, session ID, source state version, role, capabilities, model/provider/chat provenance when applicable, and independence group. Stay within the relay purpose. Return claims as fact, source claim, inference, proposal, or opinion. Do not claim approval, execution permission, canonical state authority, independent evidence, or access to unread files.
